page1.title: About Me
page1.content: Hello there! . My name is Paco, and I am PhD student at the Universidad de Granada under the supervision of professor L.J. Herrera</a> and professor Ignacio Rojas. My thesis is focused on the integration of heterogeneous sources of biological information for cancer classification. . 💻 Languages: Python, R and C++</li> | 📚 Libraries/Frameworks: Pytorch, Tensorflow, Keras, Pandas, Numpy, Django, Scikit-Learn and Matplotlib. | . In my spare time I like to play rugby 🏉, take long hikes ⛰️ and read a good book 📖! . This website is powered by fastpages. .
